title: Crunchy Fried Middle Eastern Porcini Umm-ali
description: Funky, crunchy date-night dish featuring porcini. Paleo-friendly and umm-ali form.
instructions: Cut the porcini mushrooms into thin slices.
In a bowl, beat the eggs and mix with the almond meal.
Heat the coconut oil in a skillet and fry the egg mixture for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Drain the fried mixture on paper towels and keep it warm.
In the same skillet, heat some more coconut oil and saut3 the minced garlic until fragrant.
Add the dried parsley, paprika, sumac, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir for 1 minute.
Add the porcini mushrooms to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until they are coated with the spices.
Transfer the fried egg mixture to a serving platter.
Top the egg mixture with the porcini mushroom mixture and sprinkle with crushed pistachios.
Drizzle the rice vinegar over the top of the dish.
Sprinkle with sumac for garnish, if desired.
Garnish with additional pistachios, if desired.
